title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: STARKER ARTS GARDEN FOR EDUCATION SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers week-long summer camps with a variety of interests including bike riding, cooking, crafting, gardening, nature, and science. 4485 SW Country Club Drive Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Ages 5-12 Hours: June-August Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD FOR FAMILIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - FAMILY PROGRAMMING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
